products.name: LUXE DOT BROWN
products.description:
Luxe Dot Mini Handbag – Classic Brown Edition 🤎✨
Timeless, elegant, and effortlessly stylish — the Dot Luxe Mini Handbag is designed for women who love soft neutral tones with a luxury feel. Featuring a warm brown textured body paired with a chic beige handle and strap, this bag delivers a sophisticated and versatile look for any occasion.
Its structured mini silhouette gives a polished designer vibe, while the signature round front detail adds a subtle yet distinctive touch. Finished with elegant gold-tone hardware, this bag is perfect for everyday wear and refined outings.
📏 Size Chart (in inches)
Length Width Depth
5 8.5   2.5
  Compact yet spacious — ideal for phone, cash, cards & small essentials.
🌟 Key Features
• Premium textured PU leather (soft & durable)
• Elegant brown + beige dual-tone design
• Luxury gold-tone hardware
• Sturdy top handle for a classy look
• Adjustable & detachable crossbody strap
• Magnetic flap + secure zip closure
• Lightweight with structured shape
💼 Perfect For
Daily wear • Brunch • Casual outings • Minimal chic looks
🧼 Care Instructions
• Wipe with a soft damp cloth
• Avoid water & harsh chemicals
• Do not overfill
• Store in a dust bag

products.name: LUXE DOT BLACK
products.description:
Luxe Dot Mini Handbag – Bold Black Edition 🖤❤️
Step into effortless elegance with the Dot Luxe Mini Handbag, designed for women who love bold contrast and modern style. Featuring a sleek black textured body paired with striking red accents, this bag creates a powerful and stylish statement.
The structured silhouette gives it a luxury designer feel, while the signature round red detail on the front adds a unique and eye-catching touch. Finished with gold-tone hardware, this handbag is perfect for elevating both casual and evening looks.

Length Width Depth
5 8.5   2.5
  🌟 Key Features
• Premium textured PU leather (durable & stylish)

• Magnetic flap + secure zip closure

products.name: LUXE DOT MAROON
products.description:
Luxe Dot Handbag – Chic. Compact. Statement. ✨
Turn heads with the Dot Luxe Handbag, designed for women who love minimal elegance with a playful twist. Made from premium textured PU leather, this bag features a sleek matte finish paired with soft pink accents that instantly elevate your look.
Its structured silhouette gives a polished, luxury feel, while the lightweight design ensures all-day comfort. Whether styled as a handbag or worn crossbody, it’s your perfect companion for effortless everyday fashion.
📏 Size Chart (in inches)
Length Width Depth
5 8.5   2.5
🌟 Key Features
• High-quality textured PU leather (durable & soft feel)
• Elegant maroon+ beige dual-tone design
• Premium gold-tone hardware for a luxe finish
• Sturdy top handle for a classy look
• Adjustable & detachable strap for crossbody use
• Magnetic front flap with secure zip closure
• Lightweight with a structured shape
💼 Style It For
Daily wear • Brunch dates • Casual outings • Evening looks
🧼 Care Guide
• Wipe with a soft damp cloth
• Avoid water, bleach & harsh chemicals
• Do not overfill to maintain shape
• Store in dust bag when not in use

products.name: BROWNIE AFFAIR CHECK MINI BAG
products.description:

Featuring a classic brown checkerboard pattern, premium faux leather detailing, and polished gold-tone hardware, this structured mini bag offers a chic yet functional look. It comes with sturdy top handles and a detachable shoulder strap for versatile carrying.

this mini bag is perfectly sized to carry your essentials while maintaining a sleek, fashionable silhouette. Ideal for casual outings, brunch dates, travel, or night events—this timeless piece blends practicality with luxury-inspired aesthetics.

products.name: HOBO HALF-MOON BAGS
products.description:
HOBO HALF-MOON BAGS – DESCRIPTION
The HOBO Half-Moon Bags is designed for modern women who love effortless style. Its smooth curved silhouette, premium faux leather finish, and structured handle give it a chic, minimal look that pairs perfectly with everyday outfits. Lightweight yet spacious, it easily fits your essentials — phone, wallet, makeup, and more. Ideal for daily use, outings, university, or casual events, this bag adds a classy touch to your wardrobe.
